# Other blogs on the web

**Content (verbatim)**

I read ML blogs on the web, all really interesting:

- [hunch.net](http://hunch.net) John Langford
- [ml.typepad.com](http://ml.typepad.com) Olivier Bousquet
- [yaroslavvb.blogspot.com](http://yaroslavvb.blogspot.com) Yaroslav Bulatov

I found others, but not updated. Am I missing interesting ones ?
